content.json:
## Windows Update Compliance Dashboard
Overview of Windows Quality Updates, trends, and detailed device status.

parameters.name: SearchFilter
parameters.label: Search Device/User
parameters.description: Search by Device Name, User Name, or Error Code

content.query:
IntuneDevices
| where OS == "Windows"
| where todatetime(LastContact) > {TimeRange:start}
| distinct DeviceId
| summarize count()
| extend Descrption = "Active Device Count"
| extend Summary = "Intune managed devices"
| project toint(count_), Descrption, Summary

UCClient
| where TimeGenerated > {TimeRange:start}
| distinct AzureADDeviceId
| summarize count()
| extend Descrption = "WUfB Devices"
| extend Summary = "Registered devices"
| project toint(count_), Descrption, Summary

UCClientUpdateStatus
| where UpdateCategory == "WindowsQualityUpdate" and UpdateClassification == "Security" and  UpdateReleaseTime > {TimeRange:start}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by AzureADDeviceId, UpdateReleaseTime
| extend SummaryState = iff((ClientSubstate == "UpdateInstalled"),"Patched","Not Patched")
| join kind=innerunique 
    (IntuneDevices
    | where OS contains "Windows"
    | where todatetime(LastContact) > {TimeRange:start}
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ReferenceId
    ) on $left.AzureADDeviceId == $right.ReferenceId 
| summarize count() by SummaryState
content.title: Patch Compliance (Recent)

content.query:
UCClient
| project TimeGenerated, AzureADDeviceId, OSSecurityUpdateStatus
| extend TimeRounded = bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| summarize arg_max(TimeRounded, *) by TimeRounded,AzureADDeviceId, OSSecurityUpdateStatus
| summarize ComputerCount = dcount(AzureADDeviceId,4) by TimeGenerated, OSSecurityUpdateStatus
content.title: Quality Update Patch Trend

content.query:
let ErrorMapping = datatable(ErrorSymName:string, FriendlyDescription:string, RecommendedAction:string) [
    "ERROR_GEN_FAILURE", "Generic failure (often temporary)", "Restart device and retry. If persistent, clean SoftwareDistribution folder.",
    "E_ACCESSDENIED", "Access denied (0x80070005)", "Check Antivirus exclusions or Group Policies blocking access.",
    "WU_E_DM_UPDATEREMOVED", "Update removed from catalog", "Check if update was superseded or pulled by Microsoft/Admin.",
    "ERROR_CANCELLED", "Installation cancelled", "User likely shut down or cancelled. Retry update.",
    "HTTP_E_STATUS_UNEXPECTED_REDIRECTION", "Network blocked/redirected", "Check Firewall/Proxy whitelisting for Windows Update URLs.",
    "CBS_E_SOURCE_MISSING", "Corrupt system files (0x800f081f)", "Run 'dism /online /cleanup-image /restorehealth'.",
    "CBS_E_NEW_SERVICING_STACK_REQUIRED", "Missing Servicing Stack", "Install the latest SSU (Servicing Stack Update) first.",
    "WU_E_UH_POSTREBOOTUNEXPECTEDSTATE", "Post-reboot failure", "Retry update. Check event logs for specifics.",
    "ERROR_FILE_NOT_FOUND", "File missing (0x80070002)", "Run 'sfc /scannow' to fix system corruption.",
    "ERROR_SHARING_VIOLATION", "File in use (0x80070020)", "Reboot ensuring no other installers run. Check Antivirus."
];
UCUpdateAlert
| where TimeGenerated > {TimeRange:start}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by AzureADDeviceId
| summarize AlertCount = count() by ErrorSymName
| where isnotempty(ErrorSymName)
| join kind=leftouter ErrorMapping on ErrorSymName
| extend Description = coalesce(FriendlyDescription, "Check vendor documentation"), Action = coalesce(RecommendedAction, "Search error code online")
| project ErrorCode = ErrorSymName, AlertCount, Description, Action
| top 10 by AlertCount desc
content.title: Top Upgrade Errors

content.query:
let TargetUpdates = UCClientUpdateStatus
| where TimeGenerated > {TimeRange:start}
| where UpdateCategory == "WindowsQualityUpdate"
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by AzureADDeviceId;

let ClientInfo = UCClient
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by AzureADDeviceId;

let IntuneInfo = IntuneDevices
| where todatetime(LastContact) > {TimeRange:start}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ReferenceId;

let AlertInfo = UCUpdateAlert
| where TimeGenerated > {TimeRange:start}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by AzureADDeviceId;

TargetUpdates
| join kind=leftouter (ClientInfo) on AzureADDeviceId
| join kind=leftouter (IntuneInfo) on $left.AzureADDeviceId == $right.ReferenceId
| join kind=leftouter (AlertInfo) on AzureADDeviceId
| extend DeviceKey = coalesce(AzureADDeviceId, ReferenceId)
| project 
    DeviceName,
    UserName,
    UserEmail,
    ClientState,
    ClientSubstate,
    OSBuildNumber,
    TargetRevisionNumber,
    ErrorSymName,
    ErrorCode,
    Description,
    Recommendation,
    LastWUScanTime,
    CompliantState,
    Manufacturer,
    Model,
    UpdateCategory
| where isempty("{SearchFilter}") 
    or DeviceName contains "{SearchFilter}" 
    or UserName contains "{SearchFilter}" 
    or ErrorCode contains "{SearchFilter}"
    or ErrorSymName contains "{SearchFilter}"
content.title: Detailed Device List
